I found this Wired article on AI fact-checking frustrating. It could have been about why we continue to need human fact checkers (talk to people, use judgement, resolve conflict). Instead it is full of old info & stuff about free models

GPT-5.5 Pro checked it (& I checked GPT) https://t.co/Xwi4wbxynv

We still do need human fact-checkers! And AI is not perfect! But running a few experiments with the free version of ChatGPT and citing work with old models (pre-agentic systems) and without access to web search is not a good way to understand the nature of these systems & flaws.

In fact, I would be sympathetic to the conclusion that we probably need even more fact checkers, and much more of their time can be freed up to do complex and interesting work by using AI for first-pass help.

Article: https://t.co/m5jo5Jcjv9
AIs do not use interrobangs, so maybe we should just use them all the time to show our writing is human‽
This is not a serious proposal.

Turn Claude into 20+ different specialists for marketing & business.

Install real expertise, not just prompts.

https://t.co/4GX8faMyEP

Your best prompt/workflow shouldn’t die in a folder.

Capafy turns Skills into products people can use while you get paid per run.

Closed-source.
Online.
Monetized.

This is where AI workflows stop being “cool demos” and start becoming assets.

Hot take 🔥

Most AI products don’t have a model problem.

They have a “we blindly worship benchmarks built for someone else’s use case” problem.

Your users don’t care what model won Twitter this week.

They care if your product works.

That’s why routers are the real unlock.

最近越来越理解塔勒布了，他说有些事情虽然概率极低，但其后果严重不可逆，那就不要做

因为：
概率极低x不断重试=必然发生

虽然他说的是期权交易的事情
但用来衡量人生的每一件事都是成立的
工作，婚姻，特别是健康的决策
勿以概率小而为之

兄弟们，这个产品理念好啊，我之前也做了的工作流商店demo，但是没解决的一个痛点，它解决了…

就是，现在Skills 很火，但是创建者却赚不到钱

为什么？

因为目前的 Skill 生态默认是开源的

你一发布，任何人都能复制它、转卖它。所以你只能开源赚赚名声...

还有很多人他们有很多好的 Skill

openai 的 codex 一步到位，基于 rust 来写.
如果你想知道细节，你可以用 claude code + mimo 来做逆向分析。
使用AI  harness工具 ， 从代码 直接还原为 业务需求 ，
然后从业务需求出发， 生成一个类似的产品.

2. 微软悄然撤退 Claude Code，企业 AI 编码成本真相（信息差大）

  来源: The Next Web

  核心信息:
  - 微软 2025 年 12 月让数千员工使用 Claude Code，6 个月后在"体验与设备"部门大规模取消许可证，要求迁回 GitHub Copilot CLI
  - Uber 案例：全年 AI 编码预算 4 个月耗尽，5000

3. Google 推出 AI-first Search + Gemini 3.5 + "信息代理"（信息差中等）

  来源: https://t.co/2Yk7ugCkmQ

  核心信息:
  - Google 搜索全面转向 AI-first，集成 Gemini 3.5
  - 引入 "always-on information agents"（常驻信息代理）概念
  - 结合 5 月 20 日的发布会，Google 同时推出了
